---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or a new format/redaction pattern
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
The use case or pain point behind the request.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see. If it's a new file format, note the extension(s); if it's a new
redaction pattern, give a (non-sensitive) example of the shape.

**Would this be core or an add-on?**
New formats that need heavy dependencies are usually better as a separate add-on package
that references only `Scrubkit.Abstractions`. Happy to discuss.

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds you've tried.
